parameters.query:
WITH found AS (
  SELECT
    r.id AS restaurant_id,
    r.slug,
    r.name,
    r.timezone,
    s.default_meal_duration_minutes,
    s.cleaning_buffer_minutes,
    s.grace_delay_minutes,
    s.max_party_size,
    s.allow_combined_tables,
    s.reminder_days_before,
    s.reminder_hour,
    s.reminder_channel,
    s.booking_policy,
    s.event_notification_policy
  FROM restaurants r
  JOIN restaurant_settings s ON s.restaurant_id = r.id
  WHERE r.is_active = true
    AND (
      ({{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.restaurant_slug_sql }} IS NOT NULL AND r.slug = {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.restaurant_slug_sql }})
      OR
      ({{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.to_sql }} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM restaurant_channels c
        WHERE c.restaurant_id = r.id
          AND c.is_active = true
          AND c.channel_value = {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.to_sql }}
          AND c.channel_type IN (
            {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.source_sql }},
            {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.channel_sql }},
            'retell_voice', 'retell_sms', 'phone', 'sms', 'email', 'mail', 'instagram', 'webhook'
          )
      ))
    )
  ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN r.slug = {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.restaurant_slug_sql }} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM found) AS restaurant_found,
  (SELECT restaurant_id FROM found) AS restaurant_id,
  (SELECT slug FROM found) AS restaurant_slug,
  (SELECT name FROM found) AS restaurant_name,
  COALESCE((SELECT timezone FROM found), 'Europe/Paris') AS timezone,
  COALESCE((SELECT default_meal_duration_minutes FROM found), 120) AS default_meal_duration_minutes,
  COALESCE((SELECT cleaning_buffer_minutes FROM found), 15) AS cleaning_buffer_minutes,
  COALESCE((SELECT grace_delay_minutes FROM found), 10) AS grace_delay_minutes,
  COALESCE((SELECT max_party_size FROM found), 12) AS max_party_size,
  COALESCE((SELECT allow_combined_tables FROM found), false) AS allow_combined_tables,
  COALESCE((SELECT reminder_days_before FROM found), 1) AS reminder_days_before,
  COALESCE((SELECT reminder_hour FROM found), 9) AS reminder_hour,
  COALESCE((SELECT reminder_channel FROM found), 'sms') AS reminder_channel,
  (SELECT booking_policy FROM found) AS booking_policy,
  (SELECT event_notification_policy FROM found) AS event_notification_policy;

SELECT
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM restaurant_closures
    WHERE restaurant_id = {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_id || 'NULL' }}
      AND is_active = true
      AND {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }} IS NOT NULL
      AND starts_at <= {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }}::timestamptz
      AND ends_at > {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }}::timestamptz
  ) AS is_closed,
  (
    SELECT reason
    FROM restaurant_closures
    WHERE restaurant_id = {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_id || 'NULL' }}
      AND is_active = true
      AND {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }} IS NOT NULL
      AND starts_at <= {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }}::timestamptz
      AND ends_at > {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }}::timestamptz
    ORDER BY starts_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS closure_reason;

WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_id || 'NULL' }}::bigint AS restaurant_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }}::timestamptz AS start_time,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.party_size_sql }}::int AS party_size,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.full_name_sql }}::text AS full_name,
    NULLIF('{{ String($('Verify Channel Source').item.json.conversation_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::text AS conversation_id
),
existing AS (
  SELECT
    r.id,
    r.client_id,
    r.status,
    r.start_time,
    r.party_size,
    r.conversation_id,
    CASE
      WHEN i.conversation_id IS NOT NULL
        AND r.conversation_id = i.conversation_id
        THEN 1
      WHEN i.full_name IS NOT NULL
        AND lower(COALESCE(c.full_name, '')) = lower(i.full_name)
        THEN 2
      ELSE 9
    END AS match_rank
  FROM reservations r
  LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.id = r.client_id
  CROSS JOIN input i
  WHERE r.restaurant_id = i.restaurant_id
    AND i.start_time IS NOT NULL
    AND r.start_time = i.start_time
    AND r.status IN ('confirmed', 'pending')
    AND (
      (
        i.conversation_id IS NOT NULL
        AND r.conversation_id = i.conversation_id
      )
      OR
      (
        i.full_name IS NOT NULL
        AND i.party_size IS NOT NULL
        AND r.party_size = i.party_size
        AND lower(COALESCE(c.full_name, '')) = lower(i.full_name)
      )
    )
  ORDER BY match_rank ASC, r.created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing) AS reservation_exists,
  (SELECT id FROM existing) AS existing_reservation_id,
  (SELECT client_id FROM existing) AS existing_client_id,
  (SELECT status FROM existing) AS existing_reservation_status,
  (SELECT conversation_id FROM existing) AS existing_conversation_id,
  (SELECT match_rank FROM existing) AS existing_match_rank;

WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_id || 'NULL' }}::bigint AS restaurant_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.full_name_sql }}::text AS full_name,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.phone_sql }}::text AS phone,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.email_sql }}::text AS email,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.customer_confirmed_sql }}::boolean AS customer_confirmed,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.action_sql }}::text AS action
),
existing AS (
  SELECT c.*
  FROM clients c, input i
  WHERE i.action = 'create_reservation'
    AND i.customer_confirmed = true
    AND i.restaurant_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      (i.phone IS NOT NULL AND c.phone = i.phone)
      OR
      (i.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email = i.email)
    )
  ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, c.created_at DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 1
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO clients (
    restaurant_id,
    full_name,
    phone,
    email,
    is_new_customer,
    consent_notifications,
    consent_marketing,
    created_at,
    updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    i.restaurant_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(i.full_name, ''), 'Client'),
    NULLIF(i.phone, ''),
    NULLIF(i.email, ''),
    TRUE,
    TRUE,
    FALSE,
    NOW(),
    NOW()
  FROM input i
  WHERE i.action = 'create_reservation'
    AND i.customer_confirmed = true
    AND i.restaurant_id IS NOT NULL
    AND i.full_name IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing)
  RETURNING *
),
chosen AS (
  SELECT * FROM inserted
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM existing
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM chosen) AS client_ready,
  (SELECT id FROM chosen) AS client_id,
  (SELECT full_name FROM chosen) AS client_full_name,
  (SELECT phone FROM chosen) AS client_phone,
  (SELECT email FROM chosen) AS client_email;

WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_id || 'NULL' }}::bigint AS restaurant_id,
    {{ $('Upsert Client When Needed').item.json.client_id || 'NULL' }}::bigint AS client_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }}::timestamptz AS start_time,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.party_size_sql }}::int AS party_size,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.special_request_sql }}::text AS special_request,
    {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.default_meal_duration_minutes || 120 }}::int AS meal_duration_minutes,
    {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.cleaning_buffer_minutes || 15 }}::int AS cleaning_buffer_minutes,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.customer_confirmed_sql }}::boolean AS customer_confirmed,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.action_sql }}::text AS action,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.source_sql }}::text AS source_channel,
    NULLIF('{{ String($('Verify Channel Source').item.json.conversation_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::text AS conversation_id,
    {{ $('Check Existing Reservation').item.json.reservation_exists ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }}::boolean AS reservation_exists,
    {{ $('Check Closure For Request').item.json.is_closed ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }}::boolean AS is_closed
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO reservations (
    restaurant_id,
    client_id,
    conversation_id,
    source_channel,
    status,
    party_size,
    start_time,
    end_time,
    meal_duration_minutes,
    cleaning_buffer_minutes,
    special_request,
    created_at,
    updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    i.restaurant_id,
    i.client_id,
    i.conversation_id,
    COALESCE(i.source_channel, 'retell_voice'),
    'confirmed',
    i.party_size,
    i.start_time,
    i.start_time + (i.meal_duration_minutes || ' minutes')::interval,
    i.meal_duration_minutes,
    i.cleaning_buffer_minutes,
    NULLIF(i.special_request, ''),
    NOW(),
    NOW()
  FROM input i
  WHERE i.action = 'create_reservation'
    AND i.customer_confirmed = true
    AND i.restaurant_id IS NOT NULL
    AND i.client_id IS NOT NULL
    AND i.start_time IS NOT NULL
    AND i.party_size IS NOT NULL
    AND i.reservation_exists = false
    AND i.is_closed = false
  ON CONFLICT (restaurant_id, conversation_id, start_time)
  WHERE conversation_id IS NOT NULL
  DO UPDATE SET
    updated_at = reservations.updated_at
  RETURNING *
)
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted) AS reservation_created,
  (SELECT id FROM inserted) AS reservation_id,
  (SELECT client_id FROM inserted) AS client_id,
  (SELECT status FROM inserted) AS reservation_status,
  (SELECT start_time FROM inserted) AS start_time,
  (SELECT end_time FROM inserted) AS end_time,
  (SELECT conversation_id FROM inserted) AS conversation_id;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS channel_conversation_logs (
  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  restaurant_id BIGINT,
  conversation_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  external_event_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  call_id TEXT,
  sms_id TEXT,
  email_message_id TEXT,
  instagram_message_id TEXT,
  source TEXT NOT NULL,
  channel TEXT NOT NULL,
  provider TEXT,
  phone TEXT,
  email TEXT,
  summary TEXT,
  transcript TEXT,
  user_message TEXT,
  raw_payload JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE (conversation_id, external_event_id)
);

WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_id || 'NULL' }}::bigint AS restaurant_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.conversation_id_sql }}::text AS conversation_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.external_event_id_sql }}::text AS external_event_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.call_id_sql }}::text AS call_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.sms_id_sql }}::text AS sms_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.email_message_id_sql }}::text AS email_message_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.instagram_message_id_sql }}::text AS instagram_message_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.source_sql }}::text AS source,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.channel_sql }}::text AS channel,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.provider_sql }}::text AS provider,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.phone_sql }}::text AS phone,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.email_sql }}::text AS email,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.summary_sql }}::text AS summary,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.transcript_sql }}::text AS transcript,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.user_message_sql }}::text AS user_message,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.raw_payload_sql }} AS raw_payload,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.action_sql }}::text AS action
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO channel_conversation_logs (
    restaurant_id,
    conversation_id,
    external_event_id,
    call_id,
    sms_id,
    email_message_id,
    instagram_message_id,
    source,
    channel,
    provider,
    phone,
    email,
    summary,
    transcript,
    user_message,
    raw_payload,
    created_at
  )
  SELECT
    restaurant_id,
    conversation_id,
    external_event_id,
    call_id,
    sms_id,
    email_message_id,
    instagram_message_id,
    source,
    channel,
    provider,
    phone,
    email,
    summary,
    transcript,
    user_message,
    raw_payload,
    NOW()
  FROM input
  WHERE conversation_id IS NOT NULL
    AND external_event_id IS NOT NULL
    AND action IN ('log_conversation', 'message_inbound', 'check_availability', 'create_reservation', 'get_restaurant_context')
  ON CONFLICT (conversation_id, external_event_id)
  DO UPDATE SET
    summary = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.summary, channel_conversation_logs.summary),
    transcript = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.transcript, channel_conversation_logs.transcript),
    user_message = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.user_message, channel_conversation_logs.user_message),
    raw_payload = EXCLUDED.raw_payload
  RETURNING *
)
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted) AS log_saved,
  (SELECT id FROM inserted) AS log_id;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS outbound_messages (
  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  restaurant_id BIGINT,
  conversation_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  source TEXT NOT NULL,
  channel TEXT NOT NULL,
  provider TEXT,
  recipient TEXT,
  sender TEXT,
  subject TEXT,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  payload JSONB,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $('Build Unified Business Response').item.json.restaurant_id || 'NULL' }}::bigint AS restaurant_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.conversation_id_sql }}::text AS conversation_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.source_sql }}::text AS source,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.channel_sql }}::text AS channel,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.provider_sql }}::text AS provider,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.from_sql }}::text AS recipient,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.to_sql }}::text AS sender,
    CASE
      WHEN {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.source_sql }}::text = 'email' THEN 'Réponse à votre demande de réservation'
      ELSE NULL
    END::text AS subject,
    '{{ String($('Build Unified Business Response').item.json.reply || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS content,
    '{{ JSON.stringify($('Build Unified Business Response').item.json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb AS payload
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO outbound_messages (
    restaurant_id,
    conversation_id,
    source,
    channel,
    provider,
    recipient,
    sender,
    subject,
    content,
    payload,
    status,
    created_at,
    updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    restaurant_id,
    conversation_id,
    source,
    channel,
    provider,
    recipient,
    sender,
    subject,
    content,
    payload,
    'pending',
    NOW(),
    NOW()
  FROM input
  WHERE source IN ('email', 'instagram')
    AND recipient IS NOT NULL
    AND content IS NOT NULL
  RETURNING *
)
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted) AS outbound_queued,
  (SELECT id FROM inserted) AS outbound_message_id,
  (SELECT source FROM inserted) AS queued_source,
  (SELECT channel FROM inserted) AS queued_channel,
  (SELECT recipient FROM inserted) AS queued_recipient;

parameters.jsCode:
const req = $('Verify Channel Source').item.json;
const business = $('Build Unified Business Response').item.json;
const queue = $('Queue Outbound Message When Needed').item.json;

const route =
  req.source === 'retell_voice' ? 'retell_voice_webhook' :
  req.source === 'retell_sms' ? 'retell_sms_webhook' :
  req.source === 'instagram' ? 'instagram_webhook_ack' :
  req.source === 'email' ? 'email_webhook_ack' :
  'generic_webhook_response';

const retellBody = {
  ok: business.ok,
  action: business.action,
  decision: business.decision,
  reply: business.reply,
  available: business.available,
  confirmed: business.confirmed,
  duplicate: business.duplicate,
  reservation_id: business.reservation_id,
  client_id: business.client_id,
  restaurant_id: business.restaurant_id,
  restaurant_slug: business.restaurant_slug,
  restaurant_name: business.restaurant_name,
  conversation_id: business.conversation_id,
  missing_fields: business.missing_fields,
  error_code: business.error_code,
  source_verification_status: business.source_verification_status,
  source_warnings: business.source_warnings
};

const asyncAckBody = {
  ok: true,
  accepted: true,
  route,
  source: req.source,
  channel: req.channel,
  provider: req.provider,
  conversation_id: req.conversation_id,
  outbound_queued: !!queue.outbound_queued,
  outbound_message_id: queue.outbound_message_id ?? null,
  reply_preview: business.reply,
  note: 'Message reçu par n8n. La réponse canal est mise en file outbound_messages pour envoi par un workflow provider dédié.'
};

const genericBody = {
  ok: business.ok,
  route,
  source: req.source,
  channel: req.channel,
  business_response: business,
  queue
};

const response_body =
  route === 'retell_voice_webhook' || route === 'retell_sms_webhook'
    ? retellBody
    : (route === 'email_webhook_ack' || route === 'instagram_webhook_ack'
      ? asyncAckBody
      : genericBody);

return [{
  json: {
    ...business,
    route,
    response_body,
    outbound_queued: !!queue.outbound_queued,
    outbound_message_id: queue.outbound_message_id ?? null,
    returned_to_same_provider:
      (req.source === 'retell_voice' && route === 'retell_voice_webhook') ||
      (req.source === 'retell_sms' && route === 'retell_sms_webhook') ||
      (req.source === 'email' && route === 'email_webhook_ack') ||
      (req.source === 'instagram' && route === 'instagram_webhook_ack'),
    is_route_retell_voice: route === 'retell_voice_webhook',
    is_route_retell_sms: route === 'retell_sms_webhook',
    is_route_instagram: route === 'instagram_webhook_ack',
    is_route_email: route === 'email_webhook_ack'
  }
}];

parameters.content:
# Router multi-canal

Entrées explicites :
- Retell Voice
- Retell SMS
- Email
- Instagram
- Generic Webhook

Chaque entrée marque sa source avant normalisation.
Le router final vérifie que la source repart sur la bonne réponse HTTP.

Pour Email et Instagram, le blueprint met la réponse en file `outbound_messages` au lieu d'inventer un node provider non vérifié.

La vérification cryptographique Retell n'est pas active dans ce blueprint : le champ `X-Retell-Signature` est détecté, mais la validation par secret/API key devra être ajoutée ensuite.
